case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK VS. JULIUS KARPEN et al

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR MAR-24-2010 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK AS TO DEFENDANT KARPEN, JULIUS DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-15-2009
CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING MAR-24-2010 AT 1:30PM. THIS DISMISSAL IS PURSUANT TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK SERVED MAR-02-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT KARPEN, JULIUS
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 395(B): VENUE FOR PERSONAL,FAMILY OR HOUSEHOLD OBLIGATIONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-24-2010 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
